sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif fonctionnel + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-style comprehension). Awaiting native-speaker review.
Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ A1 (Hachette), Dossier 2 'Ici, ailleurs' (indiquer le chemin, l'impératif). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
